_publications._publicationTitle: Combined Inhibition of SHP2 and MEK Is Effective in Models of NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors

details: JH-2-009 MPNST cell line showed intermediate single-agent sensitivity to RMC-4550 (SHP2i) in vitro (CCK-8 viability); combination with trametinib (MEKi) enhanced growth inhibition compared to either drug alone
